target_event: Agreement on Defense Cooperation between Finland and the United States of America
event_summary: The Defense Cooperation Agreement (DCA) is a bilateral treaty between Finland and the United States on military cooperation and their mutual obligations as NATO member states. The DCA entered into force on September 1, 2024.
acceptable_answers: agreement on defense cooperation between finland and the united states of america
dca between finland and the united states of america
